whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcActuatorTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcActuatorTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: WR1
whereRules.expression: (NOT(EXISTS(Purpose))) OR ((Purpose <> IfcAddressTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((Purpose = IfcAddressTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS(SELF.UserDefinedPurpose)))

whereRules.name: VoidsHaveAdvancedFaces
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF (QUERY (Vsh <* Voids | SIZEOF (QUERY (Afs <* Vsh.CfsFaces | (NOT ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCADVANCEDFACE' IN TYPEOF(Afs))) )) = 0 )) = 0

whereRules.name: ApplicableEdgeCurves
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY (ElpFbnds <* QUERY (Bnds <* SELF\IfcFace.Bounds | 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCEDGELOOP' IN TYPEOF(Bnds.Bound)) | NOT (SIZEOF (QUERY (Oe <* ElpFbnds.Bound\IfcEdgeLoop.EdgeList | NOT (SIZEOF (['IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCLINE', 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCCONIC', 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCPOLYLINE', 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCBSPLINECURVE'] * TYPEOF(Oe\IfcOrientedEdge.EdgeElement\IfcEdgeCurve.EdgeGeometry)) = 1 ) )) = 0 ))) = 0

whereRules.name: RequiresEdgeCurve
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY (ElpFbnds <* QUERY (Bnds <* SELF\IfcFace.Bounds | 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCEDGELOOP' IN TYPEOF(Bnds.Bound)) | NOT (SIZEOF (QUERY (Oe <* ElpFbnds.Bound\IfcEdgeLoop.EdgeList | NOT('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCEDGECURVE' IN TYPEOF(Oe\IfcOrientedEdge.EdgeElement) ))) = 0 ))) = 0

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcAirTerminalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcAirTerminalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcAirTerminalBoxTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcAirTerminalBoxTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcAlarmTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcAlarmTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: UDirectionConstraints
whereRules.expression: IfcConstraintsParamBSpline ( SELF\IfcBSplineSurface.UDegree, KnotUUpper, SELF\IfcBSplineSurface.UUpper, UMultiplicities, UKnots)

whereRules.name: VDirectionConstraints
whereRules.expression: IfcConstraintsParamBSpline ( SELF\IfcBSplineSurface.VDegree, KnotVUpper, SELF\IfcBSplineSurface.VUpper, VMultiplicities, VKnots)

whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcBeamTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcBeamTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CurveContinuous
whereRules.expression: ((NOT ClosedCurve) AND (SIZEOF(QUERY(Temp <* Segments | Temp.Transition = Discontinuous)) = 1)) OR ((ClosedCurve) AND (SIZEOF(QUERY(Temp <* Segments | Temp.Transition = Discontinuous)) = 0))

whereRules.name: SameDim
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF( QUERY( Temp <* Segments | Temp.Dim <> Segments[1].Dim)) = 0

whereRules.name: PixelAsByteAndSameLength
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY(temp<* Pixel | (BLENGTH(temp) MOD 8 = 0) AND (BLENGTH(temp) = BLENGTH(Pixel[1])) )) = SIZEOF(Pixel)

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcPlateTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcPlateTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: ValidCoefficients
whereRules.expression: (EXISTS(CoefficientsX) AND EXISTS(CoefficientsY)) OR (EXISTS(CoefficientsX) AND EXISTS(CoefficientsZ)) OR (EXISTS(CoefficientsY) AND EXISTS(CoefficientsZ)) OR (EXISTS(CoefficientsX) AND EXISTS(CoefficientsY) AND EXISTS(CoefficientsZ))

whereRules.name: WR1
whereRules.expression: EXISTS (InternalLocation) OR EXISTS (AddressLines) OR EXISTS (PostalBox) OR EXISTS (PostalCode) OR EXISTS (Town) OR EXISTS (Region) OR EXISTS (Country)

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType

whereRules.name: PlacementForShapeRepresentation
whereRules.expression: (EXISTS(Representation) AND EXISTS(ObjectPlacement)) OR (EXISTS(Representation) AND (SIZEOF(QUERY(temp <* Representation.Representations | 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSHAPEREPRESENTATION' IN TYPEOF(temp))) = 0)) OR (NOT(EXISTS(Representation)))

whereRules.name: WR21

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRailwayTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRailwayTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRailwayPartTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRailwayPartTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRampTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRampTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRampFlightTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRampFlightTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: UsenseCompatible
whereRules.expression: (('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCELEMENTARYSURFACE' IN TYPEOF(BasisSurface)) AND (NOT ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCPLANE' IN TYPEOF(BasisSurface)))) OR ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSURFACEOFREVOLUTION' IN TYPEOF(BasisSurface)) OR (Usense = (U2 > U1))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcReinforcedSoilTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcReinforcedSoilTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcReinforcingBarTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcReinforcingBarTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcReinforcingMeshTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcReinforcingMeshTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: NoVoidElement
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY(temp <* SELF\IfcRelAssociates.RelatedObjects | ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCFEATUREELEMENTSUBTRACTION' IN TYPEOF(temp)) OR ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCVIRTUALELEMENT' IN TYPEOF(temp)) )) = 0

whereRules.name: AllowedRelatedElements
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY(temp <* RelatedElements | ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSPATIALSTRUCTUREELEMENT' IN TYPEOF(temp)) AND (NOT ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSPACE' IN TYPEOF(temp))) )) = 0

whereRules.name: CorrectPhysOrVirt
whereRules.expression: ((PhysicalOrVirtualBoundary = IfcPhysicalOrVirtualEnum.Physical) AND (NOT('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCVIRTUALELEMENT' IN TYPEOF(RelatedBuildingElement)))) OR ((PhysicalOrVirtualBoundary = IfcPhysicalOrVirtualEnum.Virtual) AND (('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCVIRTUALELEMENT' IN TYPEOF(RelatedBuildingElement)) OR ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCOPENINGELEMENT' IN TYPEOF(RelatedBuildingElement)))) OR (PhysicalOrVirtualBoundary = IfcPhysicalOrVirtualEnum.NotDefined)

whereRules.name: SameCoordinateType
whereRules.expression: (('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCLENGTHMEASURE' IN TYPEOF(FirstCoordinate)) AND ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCLENGTHMEASURE' IN TYPEOF(SecondCoordinate))) OR (('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCPLANEANGLEMEASURE' IN TYPEOF(FirstCoordinate)) AND ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCPLANEANGLEMEASURE' IN TYPEOF(SecondCoordinate)))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRoadTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRoadTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRoadPartTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRoadPartTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcRoofTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcRoofTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSanitaryTerminalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSanitaryTerminalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: NoOffsets
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY(temp <* CrossSectionPositions | EXISTS(temp.Location.OffsetLateral) OR EXISTS(temp.Location.OffsetVertical) OR EXISTS(temp.Location.OffsetLongitudinal))) = 0

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSensorTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSensorTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcShadingDeviceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcShadingDeviceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: NoTopologicalItem
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF(QUERY(temp <* Items | ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCTOPOLOGICALREPRESENTATIONITEM' IN TYPEOF(temp)) AND (NOT(SIZEOF( ['IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCVERTEXPOINT', 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCEDGECURVE', 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCFACESURFACE'] * TYPEOF(temp)) = 1)) )) = 0

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSignTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSignTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSignalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSignalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSlabTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSlabTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSolarDeviceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSolarDeviceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSpaceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSpaceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSpaceHeaterTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSpaceHeaterTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: WR41
whereRules.expression: (HIINDEX(SELF\IfcObjectDefinition.Decomposes) = 1) AND ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCRELAGGREGATES' IN TYPEOF(SELF\IfcObjectDefinition.Decomposes[1])) AND (('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCPROJECT' IN TYPEOF (SELF\IfcObjectDefinition.Decomposes[1].RelatingObject)) OR ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSPATIALSTRUCTUREELEMENT' IN TYPEOF (SELF\IfcObjectDefinition.Decomposes[1].RelatingObject)) )

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSpatialZoneTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSpatialZoneTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType

whereRules.name: HasObjectType
whereRules.expression: ( (PredefinedType <> IfcLoadGroupTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND (ActionType <> IfcActionTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND (ActionSource <> IfcActionSourceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) ) OR EXISTS(SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType)

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSurfaceFeatureTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSurfaceFeatureTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: DirectrixIsPolyline
whereRules.expression: ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCPOLYLINE' IN TYPEOF(SELF\IfcSweptDiskSolid.Directrix)) OR (('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCINDEXEDPOLYCURVE' IN TYPEOF(SELF\IfcSweptDiskSolid.Directrix)) AND NOT(EXISTS(SELF\IfcSweptDiskSolid.Directrix\IfcIndexedPolyCurve.Segments)))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcSwitchingDeviceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcSwitchingDeviceTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcTankTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcTankTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcTaskTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcTaskTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS(SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: MinimumDataProvided
whereRules.expression: EXISTS (TelephoneNumbers) OR EXISTS (FacsimileNumbers) OR EXISTS (PagerNumber) OR EXISTS (ElectronicMailAddresses) OR EXISTS (WWWHomePageURL) OR EXISTS (MessagingIDs)

whereRules.name: HasMaterialLayerSetUsage
whereRules.expression: SIZEOF (QUERY(temp <* USEDIN(SELF, 'IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCRELASSOCIATES.RELATEDOBJECTS') | ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCRELASSOCIATESMATERIAL' IN TYPEOF(temp)) AND ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCMATERIALLAYERSETUSAGE' IN TYPEOF(temp.RelatingMaterial)) )) = 1

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcWasteTerminalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcWasteTerminalTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcWindowTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcWindowTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS (SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcWorkCalendarTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcWorkCalendarTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS(SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcWorkPlanTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcWorkPlanTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS(SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: CorrectPredefinedType
whereRules.expression: NOT(EXISTS(PredefinedType)) OR (PredefinedType <> IfcWorkScheduleTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) OR ((PredefinedType = IfcWorkScheduleTypeEnum.USERDEFINED) AND EXISTS(SELF\IfcObject.ObjectType))

whereRules.name: WR1
whereRules.expression: (SIZEOF(SELF\IfcGroup.IsGroupedBy) = 0) OR (SIZEOF (QUERY (temp <* SELF\IfcGroup.IsGroupedBy[1].RelatedObjects | NOT(('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCZONE' IN TYPEOF(temp)) OR ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSPACE' IN TYPEOF(temp)) OR ('IFC4X3_DEV_923b0514.IFCSPATIALZONE' IN TYPEOF(temp)) ))) = 0)

whereRules.name: ConsistentSign
whereRules.expression: ((SELF[1] >= 0) AND (SELF[2] >= 0) AND (SELF[3] >= 0) AND ((SIZEOF(SELF) = 3) OR (SELF[4] >= 0))) OR ((SELF[1] <= 0) AND (SELF[2] <= 0) AND (SELF[3] <= 0) AND ((SIZEOF(SELF) = 3) OR (SELF[4] <= 0)))

functions.name: IfcBaseAxis
functions.parametersRaw: Dim : INTEGER; Axis1, Axis2, Axis3 : IfcDirection

functions.name: IfcBooleanChoose
functions.parametersRaw: B : BOOLEAN ; Choice1, Choice2 : GENERIC : Item

functions.name: IfcConstraintsParamBSpline
functions.parametersRaw: Degree, UpKnots, UpCp : INTEGER; KnotMult : LIST OF INTEGER; Knots : LIST OF IfcParameterValue

functions.name: IfcListToArray
functions.parametersRaw: Lis : LIST [0:?] OF GENERIC : T; Low,U : INTEGER

functions.name: IfcMakeArrayOfArray
functions.parametersRaw: Lis : LIST[1:?] OF LIST [1:?] OF GENERIC : T; Low1, U1, Low2, U2 : INTEGER

functions.parametersRaw: RepType : IfcLabel; Items : SET OF IfcRepresentationItem
